name: Pasta and Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add minced garlic and diced onion; sauté until fragrant and onions are translucent, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Stir in crushed tomatoes and oregano. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 15-20 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
4. In a separate pot of salted boiling water, cook the pasta al dente according to package instructions.
5. Drain the pasta and add it to the pan with the sauce. Toss gently to combine.
6. Stir in the sweet peas. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
(You can also substitute cannellini beans or lentils.)
